action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the market environment for the specified product, including inventory, price, and current time.

product_id.description: The unique identifier for the product (e.g., 'SALMON_BATCH_X').

action_set_definitions.name: update_selling_price
action_set_definitions.description: Sets a new unit selling price for the product to influence demand velocity.

product_id.description: The unique identifier for the product.

new_price.description: The target price per unit. Must be >= cost_price to avoid negative margin.

action_set_definitions.name: pass_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation by a specified number of hours, processing sales based on the current price and market demand.

product_id.description: The unique identifier for the product.

state_description.product_id: Unique identifier for the product being priced.
state_description.current_price: The current selling price of the product.
state_description.cost_price: The unit cost of the product; used to calculate margins internally.
state_description.competitor_price: The price offered by the main competitor for a similar product.
state_description.inventory_level: Current number of units available in stock.
state_description.market_demand_factor: A multiplier representing external demand (e.g., 1.0 is normal, 1.5 is high season).
state_description.timestamp: Current simulation step or hour/day count.
